headlines.title: Member of Vance’s Secret Service detail removed amid probe into alleged compromise of security info
headlines.description: A member of JD Vance’s protective detail has been removed pending an investigation into allegations of compromising the vice president’s security, a Secret Service spokesman said Thursday.

headlines.title: House votes to end Iran war, but Senate Republicans vote to let Trump continue waging it
headlines.description: The House approved a non-binding proposal to end the Iran war, directing President Donald Trump to remove armed forces from hostilities.

headlines.title: White House says Saudi Arabia nuclear deal contingent on joining Abraham Accords
headlines.description: During a press briefing, White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt echoed a social media post from President Trump that said any nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia would be contingent on them joining the Abraham Accords. NBC News' Monica Alba reports from the White House on the potential deal and the White House's approach.

headlines.title: Rep. Jim Jordan formally asks DOJ to prosecute Jack Smith
headlines.description: House Judiciary Committee Chairman Jim Jordan, R-Ohio,sent a letter to the Justice Department requesting a criminal investigation of former special counsel Jack Smith, alleging he made false statements during a congressional deposition last year. NBC News' Gary Grumbach reports on Jordan's referral.

headlines.title: New Concerns Over Oil Prices After Houthis Attack Saudi Tankers
headlines.description: There are new concerns about the future of oil and gas prices after Yemen-based Houthi rebels, backed by Iran, attacked two Saudi Arabian oil tankers in the Red Sea. NBC’s Richard Engel reports on the new front in the Middle East conflict and Christine Romans joins TODAY with analysis on the economic impact to gas prices in the United States.

headlines.title: Trump imposes 50% tariffs on dairy, alcohol, and cars from Canada
headlines.description: The Trump administration imposed 50% tariffs on three categories of imports from Canada, dairy, alcohol, and cars, citing discriminatory actions. NBC News' Monica Alba reports on how Trump is also considering additional tariffs due to the Canadian wildfires.

headlines.title: Rep. Jim Jordan formally asks DOJ to prosecute Jack Smith over congressional testimony
headlines.description: Jordan, chair of the House Judiciary Committee, accused Smith of lying in his testimony before the committee in December. Smith’s lawyers denied he made any false statements.

headlines.title: Arizona Democrats reject party leaders’ pick for a key battleground district
headlines.description: Democrat Amish Shah, a physician and former state lawmaker, has opened a lead in the primary for a key Arizona battleground district even though party leaders backed another candidate.

headlines.title: ‘Off the charts’: Secret Service describes rising threats to protectees
headlines.description: Despite the heightened environment, the Secret Service says it’s confident in plans for the rescheduled White House Correspondents’ Association dinner.

headlines.title: Redistricting pushes incumbents toward the exits: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: In today’s edition, we dive into the still-growing number of lawmaker retirements this election cycle.

headlines.title: Trump hypes Mike Collins’ Senate campaign at Georgia rally
headlines.description: GOP Rep. Mike Collins is taking on Sen. Jon Ossoff, a well-funded Democrat, in a key battleground race.

headlines.title: U.S. signs landmark nuclear agreement with Saudi Arabia
headlines.description: The U.S. will support creating a civilian nuclear power program in the kingdom under the agreement, a senior administration official told NBC News.
